inputs.skill_yaml:
name: test-skill
version: 1.0.0
display_name: Test Skill
description: A minimal test skill
author: Core88
created: 2026-03-27
family: F99
domain: J
tag: internal
skill_type: executor
schema_version: 2
runner_version_required: '>=4.0.0'
routing_system_version_required: '>=3.0.0'
max_loop_iterations: 3
context_requirements: [workflow_id, budget_state, step_history]
execution_role: You are a test skill.
inputs:
  - name: test_input
    type: string
    required: true
    description: Test input
    validation:
      min_length: 5
outputs:
  - name: result
    type: string
    description: Test output
  - name: result_file
    type: file_path
    description: Artifact path
  - name: envelope_file
    type: file_path
    description: Envelope path
artifacts:
  storage_location: skills/test-skill/outputs/
  filename_pattern: test-skill_{workflow_id}_{timestamp}.md
  envelope_pattern: test-skill_{workflow_id}_{timestamp}_envelope.json
  format: markdown
  committed_to_repo: false
  gitignored: true
steps:
  - id: step_1
    name: Parse and validate test input
    step_type: local
    task_class: general_short
    description: Validate the test input
    input_source: inputs.test_input
    output_key: step_1_output
    idempotency: {rerunnable: true, cached: false, never_auto_rerun: false}
    requires_human_approval: false
    failure: {success_conditions: [{left: step_1_output, op: not_empty, right: true}], strategy: halt, retry_count: 0, fallback_step: null, escalation_message: Failed}
    transition: {default: step_2}
  - id: step_2
    name: Generate test output content
    step_type: llm
    task_class: moderate
    description: Generate output
    input_source: step_1.output
    output_key: generated_output
    idempotency: {rerunnable: true, cached: true, never_auto_rerun: false}
    requires_human_approval: false
    failure: {success_conditions: [{left: generated_output, op: not_empty, right: true}], strategy: retry, retry_count: 2, fallback_step: null, escalation_message: Failed}
    transition: {default: step_3}
  - id: step_3
    name: Write final test artifact
    step_type: local
    task_class: general_short
    description: Write artifact
    input_source: __final_output__
    output_key: artifact_path
    idempotency: {rerunnable: false, cached: false, never_auto_rerun: true}
    requires_human_approval: false
    failure: {success_conditions: [{left: artifact_path, op: not_empty, right: true}], strategy: halt, retry_count: 0, fallback_step: null, escalation_message: Failed}
    transition: {default: __end__}
contracts:
  machine_validated: {output_format: markdown, required_fields: [result], quality: {min_length: 50, max_length: 5000, min_quality_score: 7}, sla: {max_execution_seconds: 60, max_cost_usd: 0.05}}
  declarative_guarantees: [Output is well-formed]
approval_boundaries: {safe_steps: [step_1, step_2, step_3], approval_gated_steps: [], blocked_external_effect_steps: []}
routing: {default_alias: moderate, allow_override: false}
composable: {output_type: test_output, can_feed_into: [], accepts_input_from: []}
observability: {log_level: detailed, track_cost: true, track_latency: true, track_tokens: true, track_quality: true, metrics_file: '~/.nemoclaw/logs/skill-metrics.jsonl'}
